a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Gross enrolment ratio in secondary education, 2023

Number of children of any age group who are enrolled in
secondary
education expressed as a percentage of
the total population of the official secondary school age.
Data source: UNESCO Institute for Statistics (2024)
Note: Gross enrolment rate can surpass 100% when including students outside the official age due to early or late admissions and grade
